disclosures.name: Energy consumption data coverage as a percentage of total floor area, by property subsector
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of floor area where energy consumption data is available.

requiredMetrics.name: Energy data coverage
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of total floor area with energy consumption data

disclosures.guidanceText: Report energy consumption data coverage as a percentage of total floor area, by property subsector (office, retail, hospitality, industrial, etc.).

disclosures.name: Total energy consumed by portfolio area with data coverage, percentage grid electricity, percentage renewable
disclosures.description: Report total energy consumed across portfolio and the mix of sources.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report total energy consumed by portfolio area with data coverage, the percentage from grid electricity, and the percentage from renewable sources. Extremely relevant for GCC mega-projects where cooling is the dominant energy use.

disclosures.name: Like-for-like percentage change in energy consumption for the portfolio area with data coverage
disclosures.description: Report year-over-year change in energy consumption on a like-for-like basis.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the like-for-like percentage change in energy consumption for the portfolio area with data coverage.

disclosures.name: Percentage of eligible portfolio that has obtained an energy rating or certification
disclosures.description: Report percentage of portfolio with green building certifications.

requiredMetrics.name: Portfolio with energy certification
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage with LEED, BREEAM, Estidama, or equivalent

disclosures.guidanceText: Report percentage of portfolio with LEED, BREEAM, Estidama Pearl Rating (UAE), or equivalent green building certification. Critical for GCC mega-projects like NEOM, The Line, Lusail.

disclosures.name: Water withdrawal data coverage as a percentage of total floor area
disclosures.description: Report percentage of floor area where water data is available.

requiredMetrics.name: Water data coverage
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of total floor area with water data

disclosures.guidanceText: Report water withdrawal data coverage as a percentage of total floor area and by property subsector.

disclosures.name: Total water withdrawn by portfolio area with data coverage, percentage in regions with High or Extremely High Baseline Water Stress
disclosures.description: Report total water withdrawn and the percentage from water-stressed regions.

requiredMetrics.name: Percentage in high water stress
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage from high water stress regions

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total water withdrawn and the percentage in regions with High or Extremely High Baseline Water Stress. All GCC real estate projects are in extremely high water stress areas.

disclosures.name: Like-for-like percentage change in water withdrawn
disclosures.description: Report year-over-year change in water consumption.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the like-for-like percentage change in water withdrawn for the portfolio area with data coverage.

disclosures.name: Area of properties located in 100-year flood zones
disclosures.description: Report the area of real estate assets located in 100-year flood zones.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the area of properties (in sq ft or sq meters) in FEMA Special Flood Hazard Areas or equivalent. For GCC, consider sea-level rise risk for coastal developments.

disclosures.name: Description of climate change risk exposure analysis and strategies for mitigating risks
disclosures.description: Describe climate risk exposure and mitigation strategies for the portfolio.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the climate change risk exposure analysis, including extreme heat exposure (critical for GCC), sea-level rise, and strategies for building resilience into the real estate portfolio.

disclosures.name: Percentage of new leases that contain a cost recovery clause for resource efficiency improvements; associated leased floor area

requiredMetrics.name: Green lease percentage
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of new leases with green clauses

requiredMetrics.name: Green lease floor area
requiredMetrics.description: Floor area covered by green leases

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of new leases containing clauses for environmental performance improvement and associated floor area.

disclosures.name: Percentage of tenants that are separately metered or submetered for grid electricity consumption and water withdrawals
disclosures.description: Report sub-metering coverage for tenant spaces.

requiredMetrics.name: Electricity sub-metered tenants
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of tenants with electricity sub-meters

requiredMetrics.name: Water sub-metered tenants
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of tenants with water sub-meters

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of tenants that are separately metered or sub-metered for electricity and water.
